observations.summary: Dan's emotional state is not just fear but a deeper, more profound shattering, indicating a complex internal collapse beyond mere terror.

bridge_evidence.quote: The muscles clenched to rigid, jaw locked, breathing a frantic high-pitched whistle.

observations.polarity: Shaping Dream vs. Defying Old Legacy
observations.summary: Dan exerts his will to shape his father's dream but simultaneously expends all reserves to defy an ancient, enduring force predating Hebron, highlighting a tension between creation and rebellion.

left_evidence.quote: He had poured his will into shaping his father's dream

right_evidence.quote: then spent every reserve defying something that had been old when Hebron was new.

bridge_evidence.quote: The muscles clenched to rigid, jaw locked, breathing a frantic high-pitched whistle.
